title: IIT Kharagpur is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: IIT Kharagpur is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
IIT Kharagpur, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Kharagpur:
IIT Kharagpur is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Kharagpur!
